# Naos Kampanya Project - Copilot Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Details
- Type: React + Vite
- Purpose: Pharmacy campaign and locator website
- Features: Campaign banners, pharmacy search, Google Maps integration
- Status: Frontend completed, backend integration pending

## Completed Steps
1. ✅ Created Vite + React project
2. ✅ Installed @react-google-maps/api for Google Maps integration
3. ✅ Created CampaignBanner component with gradient design
4. ✅ Created CampaignDetails component with campaign cards
5. ✅ Created PharmacyLocator component with filters and map
6. ✅ Implemented pharmacy search by name, city, and district
7. ✅ Added responsive design for mobile/tablet
8. ✅ Created comprehensive README
9. ✅ Development server running at http://localhost:5173
10. ✅ All documentation complete

## Documentation Files
- README.md - Full project documentation
- QUICKSTART.md - Quick start guide
- GOOGLE_MAPS_SETUP.md - Google Maps API setup
- PROJECT_SUMMARY.md - Project completion summary
- ARCHITECTURE.md - Technical architecture details

## Next Steps for User
- Add Google Maps API key (user needs to provide)
- Integrate real pharmacy API
- Add loading states and error handling
- Test on different devices
- Deploy to production
